tasks.title: Create Dynamic Task Input Component
tasks.description: Design and implement a React component that provides an intuitive interface for users to input task descriptions in natural language. The component should include text area, suggestion dropdown, and real-time preview functionality.
acceptance_criteria: Text area accepts natural language input
Real-time preview shows structured task format
Suggestion dropdown appears for categories and priorities
Component follows theme standards for consistent styling
Input validation prevents empty or invalid submissions

tasks.title: Implement Natural Language Processing Service
tasks.description: Develop a backend service that analyzes natural language task descriptions and extracts structured information including task type, priority, category, and potential dependencies. The service should integrate with the existing API architecture.
acceptance_criteria: Service correctly parses natural language input
Handles edge cases and invalid input gracefully
Integration tests pass for common use cases

tasks.title: Build Task Generation Workflow Integration
tasks.description: Create the complete workflow that connects the UI component with the NLP service and integrates the generated tasks into the existing task management system. Include validation, error handling, and user feedback mechanisms.
acceptance_criteria: End-to-end workflow from input to task creation works smoothly
Error states are handled with appropriate user feedback
Loading states provide clear progress indicators
Successfully generated tasks appear in main task list
User can edit generated tasks before final creation
Workflow integrates with existing notification system
